  • A Multi-Spectroscopic Approach to Monitor Catalyst Deactivation in Homogeneous Catalysis
  • Adding value from whey – sustainable use of dairy side streams to produce prebiotics by innovative combination of enzymes
  • Adsorption and desorption performance and stability of amine functionalized resins in Direct Air Capture

  • Advancing molybdenum carbide catalysts for sustainable syngas production in the reverse water-gas shift reaction
  • Ammonia synthesis catalyzed by mixed metal oxides supported on N-doped carbon obtained from deep eutectic solvents
  • An atomistic model for surface corrosion of RuO2-based electrocatalysts for the acidic oxygen evolution reaction
  • An Electrochemical Screening Reactor Kit for Rapid Optimization of Electrosynthesis Applications
  • Anion effect on product selectivity during electrochemical CO2 conversion
  • Application of operando spectroscopy for process control.
  • Arene Hydrogenation Using Supported Polyoxo-Noble-Metalates
  • BETA – Bioethanol to Acetone
  • Bio-Based Chemicals from Local Plant Oils via Homogeneous Catalysis and the Role of Polyunsaturated Components: Identified, Demystified, Simplified.
  • BioFraMe - Hydrogenation catalysts based on bio-based deep eutectic solvents
  • BioValCat – Enhanced Biomass Valorisation by Engineering of Polyoxometalate Catalysts
  • Boon and bane of local solid-state chemistry on the performance of solid oxide cells
  • Boosting carbonylation chemistry through tunable active sites via d-block metal-p-block element synergy
  • Boron doped diamond as catalyst for the electrochemical reduction of molecular nitrogen
  • Bottom-up synthesis of core@shell catalysts for particle size and confinement effect investigation in Fischer-Tropsch synthesis: current status and perspective
  • Bulk Fe-Rh catalysts for high-pressure CO2 hydrogenation to alcohols – recognizing the influence of rhodium on the model system
  • Carbon monoxide, propene and toluene oxidation on Fe – Mn mixed oxide catalysts in lean exhaust gas of small-scale fireplaces
  • Catalytic biomass gasification for sustainable H2 production
  • Catalytic Depolymerization of Polyolefins to Liquid Alkanes. Mechanistic Insights of Polyethylene Hydrogenolysis under Sub- and Supercritical Conditions
  • Catalytic hydroconversion of biogenic substrates with a bifunctional heteropolyacid catalyst
  • Catalytic NH3 decomposition over Ni/Al2O3 in a stagnation flow
  • Catalytic Reactor and Peripheric Equipment Metadata from Existing Standards and Ontologies
  • Catalytic testing and kinetic measurements of GaNi Supported catalytically active liquid metal solutions (SCALMS) for selective oligomerization of ethylene
  • Catalyzing CO Hydrogenation: Evaluating MOF-Derived Catalysts for Short-Chain Olefins Production
  • Challenges in using Renewable Feeds for Methanol Synthesis: Catalyst Deactivation with H2 and its Impurities
  • Characterization of μm-sized sample surfaces by X-ray reflectivity
  • Chemical Hydrogen Storage by the LOHC System Benzyltoluene – Reaction Equilibria for Hydrogen Loading and Release
  • CO-Oxidation Proceeds via a Monodentate Carbonate-Facilitated Mechanism over Mixed LaFe1-xCoxO3 Catalysts
  • CO2 and CO adsorption studies on CeO2-based materials
  • CO2 methanation over Ni catalysts supported on CeO2 and CeSmOx: the influence of Sm addition
  • Combined operando spectroscopic insight into CO2 hydrogenation over InOx/m-ZrO2 catalysts
  • Comparative Study of FTO and Carbon Cloth for Electrocatalytic Hydrogenation of Phenol on Platinum Catalyst
  • Comparison of Liquid Thermal and Electrocatalysis for the Selective Oxidation of Ethylene Glycol over Cobalt Spinel Oxides
  • Comparison of catalyst pellet shapes in a single pellet string reactor (SPSR)
  • Concepts for tuning the noble metal cluster formation in oxidation catalysts during operation
  • Core-Shell Catalyst Pellets: Theoretical Background, Preparation, and Experimental Validation
  • De-risking of a new homogeneous catalyzed methanol production process: Challenges from lab scale to tons scale
  • Deactivation of Cu/ZnO/Al2O3 catalysts in methanol synthesis from CO2/H2 and a way to counteract it
  • Decoding the Structure of Technical Multi-Promoted Ammonia Synthesis Catalysts
  • Defective La2O3 for non-oxidative propane dehydrogenation: Active sites and effect of hydrogen co-feeding
